========== helm安装后 获得Token =======

kubectl -n kubernetes-dashboard  create token admin-user

--------------------- 手动长期有效的 API 令牌 ----------- 
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  namespace: kubernetes-dashboard
  name: kuberboard-operator-secret
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/service-account.name: "kuberboard-operator-secret"
type: kubernetes.io/service-account-token
EOF
